algorithms.name: bubble_sort
algorithms.reason: Nested loops with element comparison and swap — classic Bubble Sort pattern.
algorithms.suggestion: Consider replacing with Python's built-in sorted() (Tim Sort, O(n log n)).

algorithms.name: dfs
algorithms.suggestion: DFS uses O(V) stack space. For very deep graphs, consider iterative DFS to avoid stack overflow.

algorithms.name: bfs
algorithms.suggestion: BFS finds shortest paths in unweighted graphs. For weighted graphs, use Dijkstra.

items.title: 🧠 Bubble Sort Detected (Line 9–10)
items.message:
Bubble Sort detected (lines 9–10).
Reason: Nested loops with element comparison and swap — classic Bubble Sort pattern.

items.title: 🧠 Depth-First Search (DFS) Detected (Line 1–0)
items.message:
Depth-First Search (DFS) detected (lines 1–0).
Reason: Stack-based or recursive exploration — DFS.

Space: O(V)

items.title: 🧠 Breadth-First Search (BFS) Detected (Line 54–72)

Breadth-First Search (BFS) detected (lines 54–72).
Reason: Queue-based level-order traversal — BFS.

Space: O(V)
